  • Uses of PostResponse in com.example.restapi.service

    Methods in com.example.restapi.service that return PostResponse
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PostResponse
    PostService.createPost(Post post)
    Persists a new post.
    PostResponse
    PostService.getPostById(Long id)
    Retrieves a single post by id.
    PostResponse
    PostService.updatePost(Long id, Map<String,Object> updates)
    Applies a partial update to an existing post.
    Methods in com.example.restapi.service that return types with arguments of type PostResponse
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<PostResponse>
    PostService.getAllPosts()
    Returns all posts ordered by creation date (newest first).
    List<PostResponse>
    PostService.getPostsByAuthor(UUID authorId)
    Returns every post written by a specific author.
